completed_steps.summary: Classified as Odoo Addon Collection with 3 modules (icofr, icofr_demo, icofr_demo_new_features)
Found existing documentation (READMEs, User Guide, Demo Scenarios) and SOP/Policy PDFs
Tech stack analyzed: Odoo 19.0, Python, PostgreSQL. Architecture pattern: Odoo MVC.
Deep dive into core models (control, risk, testing, materiality) and security roles completed.
Full documentation suite generated (Overview, Architecture, Source Tree, Data Models, Dev/Deploy Guides, API Contracts).

findings.demo_scenarios: Simulates 16 scenarios covering Line 1-3 interactions, audit cycles, and remediation.
findings.source_tree_summary: Core logic in icofr/models, UI in icofr/views, Demo data in icofr_demo/data.

security_roles.Lini 1: Business Unit - Can edit own controls, read-only risks, CSA participation.
security_roles.Lini 2: Risk/ICOFR Team - Master controllers, scoping, and methodology management.
security_roles.Lini 3: Internal Audit - Full access to testing, read-only elsewhere to ensure independence.

ui_features.Risk Heatmap: 5x5 Likelihood vs Impact Matrix using Odoo Pivot.
ui_features.Import Wizards: XLSX Uploads for RCM, GL Mapping, and Audit Populations.
ui_features.Line Reporting: Segregated reporting views for Line 1, 2, and 3.

data_models_summary.icofr.control: Master controls with EUC/IPE/MRC/ITGC logic and mandatory Table 14 validations.
data_models_summary.icofr.risk: 5x5 Heatmap logic combining Table 10 (Quant) and Table 11 (Qual) factors.
data_models_summary.icofr.testing: Complex workflow supporting TOD/TOE, cooling-off (Hal 19), remediation lock (Tabel 23), and Dec sampling (Tabel 22).
data_models_summary.icofr.materiality: Scoping engine with 2/3 Rule (Tabel 6) and Group Multiplier (Tabel 25).
